pages.title: Glock 17
pages.text: Every survivor receives one Glock 17. Its magazine holds 17 rounds. Keep distance, choose shots carefully.

pages.title: One Full Magazine
pages.text: The kit includes exactly 17 rounds of 9mm ammunition: one full Glock magazine. These are emergency supplies, not a renewable stockpile.

pages.title: Leather Canteen
pages.text: The canteen begins empty. Fill it early; direct hand drinking is disabled in this pack, and thirst can prevent sprinting and natural health regeneration.

pages.title: Issued Once
pages.text: The starter loadout is awarded once per player. If your inventory is full when it arrives, check the ground nearby.
